subject: Local Tomcat redeploy validation
fact: After copying a fresh WAR into the Homebrew Tomcat 10 webapps directory, wait until GET /event-flow/login.jsp returns 200 before running runtime smoke checks; earlier requests can hit 404 or misleading NoSuchFileException failures for WEB-INF/lib jars while the deployment is still materializing.
reason: This repo repeatedly validates backend slices by redeploying to a local Homebrew Tomcat instance, and premature smoke requests can look like application regressions even when the code is fine.
